outline.title: "What Really Happened" (WRH) 75-Session Master Curriculum

outline.title: Trauma is a predictable engineering problem, not a character flaw

outline.title: Survival is wiring that was soldered on during the "Original War"

outline.title: The "Hum" is a constant fire alarm that drives high-performance masks

outline.title: The "Freeze" response is a tactical delay, not a lack of discipline
